rationale: The cited paper appears as a single supporting reference in a grouped sentence in the discussion/future-directions section, where the authors note that linguistic certainty may matter for information spread. The citing article does not use this source to build its core theory, hypotheses, measurement design, or empirical tests; its main foundation is broader attitude-certainty and text-analysis work. Because the citation serves as a peripheral example rather than a functional pillar of the paper's contribution, the role is best classified as a passing mention.
